title: hortensia macrophylla f. normalis
intro: Hortensia macrophylla f. normalis, also known as the common hydrangea, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the hydrangea family. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. Hortensia macrophylla f. normalis has various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as a diuretic to help with water retention. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
